mapper.select:
select distinct t.id, t.tool_name, t.description, t.logo_url, t.access_type, t.route_path, t.iframe_url, t.github_url, t.price, t.original_price, t.point_cost, t.status, t.good_count, t.neutral_count, t.bad_count, t.view_count, t.total_usage, t.collection_count, t.remark, t.resource_type, t.level, t.create_by, t.create_time, t.update_by, t.update_time, t.delete_flag, case when c.id is null then 0 else 1 end as collection_flag from osh_tool t
inner join osh_tool_tag_rel tr on tr.tool_id = t.id and tr.delete_flag = 0 and tr.tag_id in
#{tagId}
left join osh_tool_collection c on c.tool_id = t.id and c.user_id = #{userId} and c.delete_flag = 0
left join osh_tool_collection c on 1 = 0
where t.delete_flag = 0 and t.status = 1
and ( t.tool_name like concat('%', #{request.keyword}, '%') or t.description like concat('%', #{request.keyword}, '%') or exists ( select 1 from osh_tool_tag_rel r2 inner join osh_tool_tag tg2 on tg2.id = r2.tag_id where r2.tool_id = t.id and r2.delete_flag = 0 and tg2.delete_flag = 0 and tg2.name like concat('%', #{request.keyword}, '%') ) )
and t.resource_type = #{request.resourceType}
and c.id is not null
order by t.total_usage desc, t.collection_count desc, t.id desc

select id, tool_name, description, logo_url, access_type, route_path, iframe_url, github_url, price, original_price, point_cost, status, good_count, neutral_count, bad_count, view_count, total_usage, collection_count, remark, resource_type, level, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, delete_flag from osh_tool where id = #{id} and delete_flag = 0 limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into osh_tool ( tool_name, description, logo_url, access_type, route_path, iframe_url, github_url, price, original_price, point_cost, status, remark, resource_type, level, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, delete_flag ) values ( #{toolName}, #{description}, #{logoUrl}, #{accessType}, #{routePath}, #{iframeUrl}, #{githubUrl}, #{price}, #{originalPrice}, #{pointCost}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{resourceType}, #{level}, #{createBy}, now(), #{updateBy}, now(), 0 )
mapper.update:
update osh_tool
tool_name = #{toolName}, description = #{description}, logo_url = #{logoUrl}, access_type = #{accessType}, route_path = #{routePath}, iframe_url = #{iframeUrl}, github_url = #{githubUrl}, price = #{price}, original_price = #{originalPrice}, point_cost = #{pointCost}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, resource_type = #{resourceType}, level = #{level}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now()
where id = #{id} and delete_flag = 0

update osh_tool set delete_flag = 1, update_by = #{operator}, update_time = now() where delete_flag = 0 and id in
#{id}
update osh_tool set collection_count = collection_count + 1 where id = #{toolId} and delete_flag = 0
update osh_tool set collection_count = case when collection_count > 0 then collection_count - 1 else 0 end where id = #{toolId} and delete_flag = 0
